title: Adrenaline Rush : Second Chance
description: Add "final shout" & "second chance" & "last breath" mechanic into minecraft! You'll have 0,5 HP  instead of dying when fall from height ; Buff your power when you at low HP
body:
# THIS DATAPACK/MOD NOW REQUIRE [FokusAPI](https://modrinth.com/datapack/fokusapi)
# Adrenaline Rush
> Add "final shout" & "second chance" & "last breath" mechanics into minecraft!
# Demo
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/bDJdzg-RFkg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Features
> Config : `/function adrerush:menu/main`
## Rush
+ Give you Speed, Strength and Resistance effects on a short duration when you at low HP!
+ "Adrenaline Rush" have countdown (Configurable - 10 Min countdown). Beware! 
## Second chance
+ You will have 0,5 HP instead of dying when fall from any height (Configurable - 25 Min countdown)
## Last breath
+ When you run out of breath , instead of being drowned - you will breath 5 more seconds . Configurable - 10 minutes countdown
# Try my others mod
  
+ [**Brutal Nightmare**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/brutal-nightmare) - Minecraft, but with insane difficulty. Zombie place/break blocks, throw TNT. Skeleton, Creeper, Ghasts, Spider,Phantom,... get new abilities.New mini bosses...
+ [**Double Jump**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coffdoublejump) - Add Double Jump and Leap mechanic to minecraft with sneak button!
+ [**Useful Snowball**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/usefulsnowball) - Useful Snowball! Make snowball slows mob.
+ [**Wall Climbing**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coffwallclimb) - Add Wall Climb (Wall Jump) mechanic to minecraft
+ [**Awful Lightning**](https://modrinth.com/datapack/coffeegs-awful-lightning) - Struck lightning on players more oftenly, can create fun & surprising deaths with lightning bolts.
# Creator
Made with Love by ScadeBlock
